description: Template expectations for a deterministic URL ingestion fixture.

product_spec_checks.name: Model name is present when this fixture is a product page.
Driving range is captured when visible.

entity_boundary_checks.name: Entity A and Entity B should not be merged when DOM-aware card chunking is enabled.

notes: Copy this file into a scenario folder and replace the snippets with sample-specific checks.
Use broad snippet and metadata assertions unless the fixture is intentionally tiny.
